channel.title: AI Builder's Field Guide — Recently Added
channel.description: A daily-curated wiki of the tools, models, and patterns that AI power-users and builders actually reach for.

item.title: Claude Code
item.description: Anthropic's official terminal-native coding agent — reads your repo, edits files, runs commands, talks to MCP servers. — The reference implementation for agentic coding: full-context repo understanding, permissions model, hooks, and skills. If you're building developer agents, study how it ships.

item.title: Cursor
item.description: AI-first VS Code fork with Composer, Tab autocomplete, and a strong agent loop. — The dominant IDE among working AI builders in 2026 — diff review UX is the bar everyone else is chasing.

item.title: Windsurf
item.description: Codeium's agentic IDE with Cascade — strong long-running task execution, now part of OpenAI. — Cascade pioneered the 'agent that keeps going across many turns' pattern; worth comparing against Cursor Composer for taste.

item.title: Aider
item.description: Open-source CLI pair-programmer — git-native, model-agnostic, and the benchmark for many leaderboards. — The polyglot baseline. If you're benchmarking your own agent, Aider's leaderboards are where the field calibrates.

item.title: Cline
item.description: Open-source autonomous coding agent for VS Code — plan/act modes, MCP support, BYO model. — The transparent option: every action shown and approvable. Good for understanding how an agent loop actually works.

item.title: Claude API (Anthropic)
item.description: Anthropic's API — Claude Opus 4.7, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5. Native tool use, prompt caching, extended thinking, files, citations. — Best-in-class for long-horizon tool use and agentic coding. Prompt caching alone often pays for the migration.

item.title: OpenAI API
item.description: GPT-5 family, Realtime API, structured outputs, Responses API. — Still the broadest ecosystem and the realtime voice baseline. Responses API is the cleanest agent primitive OpenAI ships.

item.title: Gemini API (Google)
item.description: Gemini 2.5 Pro / Flash with 2M-token context, native multimodal, and grounding-with-Search. — If your workload is video, very-long-context, or needs fresh web grounding without your own RAG, start here.
